feed.title: [BUG]: spammers get Bitcoin blockspace at discounted price. Let's fix it

entry.title: [BUG]: spammers get Bitcoin blockspace at discounted price. Let's fix it
entry.summary:
The forthcoming activation of the Bitcoin Improvement Proposal 110 (BIP-110) is expected to mitigate certain issues within the Bitcoin network. This proposal, detailed extensively at [GitHub](https://github.com/bitcoin/bips/blob/bd564167864ab293a41f3dad0bb029f5ea9b4467/bip-0110.mediawiki), introduces modifications aimed at enhancing the network's functionality and user experience. The anticipated changes are designed to address specific problems, potentially improving overall system efficiency and reliability.
The document outlines the technical specifications and rationale behind the proposal, providing insight into how these adjustments could lead to significant improvements in transaction handling and processing. By focusing on targeted enhancements, BIP-110 aims to fortify the Bitcoin network against existing challenges, ensuring a more robust framework for digital transactions.
This development represents a proactive approach to cryptocurrency infrastructure maintenance, reflecting the community's commitment to continuous improvement and innovation. As such, the activation of BIP-110 later this year marks a noteworthy milestone in the ongoing evolution of the Bitcoin ecosystem, promising to bolster its resilience and scalability for future demands.
